response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a matte champagne/silver metallic body, cylindrical in shape with a fine mesh grille at the top. The body bears the text 'PHANTOM classic' and a serial number 'Nr. 1307', along with a circular logo emblem. The microphone is mounted in a silver spider shock mount with elastic suspension bands. A circular black pop filter with dual-layer mesh is attached via a black gooseneck arm positioned in front of the capsule. The overall assembly is vertical, oriented upright.", "consistencyTag": "phantom-classic-condenser-mic-silver", "suggestedToken": "PHANTOM_CLASSIC_MIC"}
